event: View of Vienna with St. Stephen's Cathedral
description: A watercolor painting of a busy Viennese street with ornate multi-story buildings lining both sides. At the end of the street, the tall Gothic spire of St. Stephen's Cathedral rises against a blue sky with light clouds. The street is populated with pedestrians, a green tramway, and horse-drawn vehicles. The buildings feature elaborate facades typical of Viennese architecture. The palette is light and airy with warm stone tones and blue sky. The text 'WIEN' and 'FRIEDRICH FRANK' appear in the lower right corner.

_meta.title: View across the Karntnerstrasse to St. Stephen's Cathedral
